design_philosophy: Tactical Minimalism. Command-center focus for the gym. Elite athleticism. Flat surfaces, stark contrasts, glowing accents strictly for kinetic triggers.

fonts.purpose: Body text, UI labels, dense data

scale.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tighter uppercase font-black font-['Barlow_Condensed']
scale.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl tracking-tight uppercase font-bold font-['Barlow_Condensed']

dashboard_grid.classes: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4 md:gap-6
dashboard_grid.rules: Every pixel must be utilized. No jagged bottoms. Use col-span-2 or 3 for primary charts, col-span-1 for summary metrics.

social_grid.rules: Asymmetry. Visual tension. Tall and wide cards mixed.

layout.spacing: Dense for dashboard metrics (p-4 or p-6), generous for layout gaps (gap-6).

surfaces_and_effects.cards: Flat background (#161618), sharp 1px border (border-white/10), rounded-md (max 8px radius). No generic drop shadows.
surfaces_and_effects.active_glow: For primary CTA and streaks: box-shadow: 0 0 15px rgba(255,59,48,0.4)

components.buttons: Square or rounded-md corners, font-heading uppercase, tracking-wider, heavy weight. Primary: bg-[#FF3B30] text-white hover:bg-white hover:text-[#0f0f10] transition-colors.
components.charts: Recharts with transparent backgrounds, stark white axes, and bright neon lines (red/blue) without gradient fills under them.
components.inputs: Flat dark bg, border-white/20, text-white. Focus ring: 2px solid #FF3B30.

icons.style: Clean, sharp outlines. Colored in accent colors for active states.

testing.requirements: All interactive elements, forms, and major metric containers must have a 'data-testid' attribute (e.g., data-testid='workout-log-button').

instructions_to_main_agent: Install and configure Tailwind and Shadcn CSS components per standard usage.
Add 'Barlow Condensed' and 'Manrope' to Google Fonts link in index.html.
Apply deep obsidian background to body (`bg-[#0f0f10] text-white`).
For the login page, use `login_hero_bg` with a subtle linear-gradient overlay for heavy impact.
The Dashboard must use the 'Control Room' grid layout: dense metrics, stark contrasts.
Avoid the generic Vercel aesthetic. No excessive glassmorphism. Use flat surfaces with sharp 1px borders.
Ensure all Shadcn components (buttons, inputs) are heavily themed to match tactical minimalism. Rounded-md max.
For charts, use Recharts. Make background transparent, axes white/gray, and data lines stark neon red (#FF3B30).
Use Nutritionix API and Firebase as requested in the functional spec.
When rendering feeds, map to the URLs provided in `social_feed` and `avatars` arrays. NO placeholders.
